creator: freebsd@spam.mombe.org
text:
Created attachment 151455
shar archive of emulators/p5-Perl4-CoreLibs port

This is a collection of ".pl" files that have historically been bundled
with the Perl core but are planned not to be so distributed with
core version 5.15 or later.

WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Perl4-CoreLibs/
